description: Negative test: agent is asked to create a device but the test captures whether it actually invokes device create. If agent just chatters, expected to score low on tool_accuracy.

turns.user: 请帮我添加一个新设备：名称 'Office Sensor'，类型 temp_sensor，MQTT 连接

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent 应该调用 shell 工具执行 `neomind device create` 来真正创建设备
expectations.overall: 如果 agent 只描述流程而不调用工具，则 tool_accuracy 应打低分（≤4）
